case_title: SUMSKI, JACK IND DBA DAVIS REALTY vs. WILLIAMS, ANDREA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUMSKI, JACK IND DBA DAVIS REALTY AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ANDREA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 57 TAYLOR, #154, S.F, CA.- WRIT TO ISSUE, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 4-25-94, 5PM - DEF. TO LEAVE PREMISES IN GOOD ORDER & REPAIR - RENT & DAMAGES & COSTS & FEES WVD. - SEC. DEP. RETAINED BY PL. & ACCOUNTING OF DEPOSIT WVD. - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS - PL. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUMSKI, JACK IND DBA DAVIS REALTY SERVED MAR-15-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ANDREA
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ANDREA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON APR-13-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ANDREA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ANDREA

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUMSKI, JACK IND DBA DAVIS REALTY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-07-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-13-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ANDREA
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ANDREA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ANDREA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 57 TAYLOR ST, #154, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL APR-25-1994, ALL RENT & DAMAGES, COSTS & ATTY FEES WVD. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. PERS. PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. DEF. TO LEAVE PROPERTY FREE OF PROPERTY & PERSONS. DEPOSITS FORF. BY DEF./ TO PL. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
